'''dhafoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ufufunyana|ufufunyana]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-f-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ufufunyana|ufufunyana]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhafoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæfeteth|dhæfeteth]] || [[word:dhæfetej|dhæfetej]] || [[word:dhæfetesh|dhæfetesh]] || [[word:dhæfete|dhæfete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhafofototh|dhafofototh]] || [[word:dhafofotoj|dhafofotoj]] || [[word:dhafofotosh|dhafofotosh]] || [[word:dhafofoto|dhafofoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhafototh|dhafototh]] || [[word:dhafotoj|dhafotoj]] || [[word:dhafotosh|dhafotosh]] || [[word:dhafoto|dhafoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhafoftoth|dhafoftoth]] || [[word:dhafoftoj|dhafoftoj]] || [[word:dhafoftosh|dhafoftosh]] || [[word:dhafoftof|dhafoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhafototho|dhafototho]] || [[word:dhafotojo|dhafotojo]] || [[word:dhafotosho|dhafotosho]] || [[word:dhafotoko|dhafotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhafototh|dhafototh]] || [[word:dhafotoj|dhafotoj]] || [[word:dhafotosh|dhafotosh]] || [[word:dhafoto|dhafoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhafotothol|dhafotothol]] || [[word:dhafotojol|dhafotojol]] || [[word:dhafotoshol|dhafotoshol]] || [[word:dhafotokol|dhafotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhafotothotho|dhafotothotho]] || [[word:dhafotojojo|dhafotojojo]] || [[word:dhafotoshosho|dhafotoshosho]] || [[word:dhafotoko|dhafotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhafotothon|dhafotothon]] || [[word:dhafotojon|dhafotojon]] || [[word:dhafotoshon|dhafotoshon]] || [[word:dhafotokon|dhafotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhafotothoro|dhafotothoro]] || [[word:dhafotojoro|dhafotojoro]] || [[word:dhafotoshoro|dhafotoshoro]] || [[word:dhafotokoro|dhafotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
